title: Coolers to CEO
tagline: Move beyond selling product — build a structured, scalable water ice business with long-term growth potential.
description:
Coolers To CEO was created to help entrepreneurs move beyond simply selling products and start building a structured, scalable business with long-term growth potential.

Whether you are just starting your journey or looking to take your operation to the next level, this program provides the tools, education, support, and community needed to help you build a profitable future within the water ice industry.
highlights: Priority access to events, vending & catering opportunities
chapters: Monthly business growth & strategy trainings designed to help entrepreneurs scale smarter
Live group coaching sessions with real-world guidance and operational insights
Proven pricing systems and profit-maximization strategies to increase revenue
Professional marketing resources, promotional materials, and customizable Canva templates
Exclusive wholesale pricing and vendor discounts on products, supplies, and equipment
Access to a private community of motivated entrepreneurs focused on growth and collaboration
Priority opportunities for events, vending locations, catering, and business expansion

title: Frozen Fortune
tagline: The Entrepreneur's Blueprint to the Water Ice Industry — build your water ice empire from the ground up.
description:
Frozen Fortune is more than just an eBook — it is a complete entrepreneurial blueprint designed to help aspiring business owners successfully enter and thrive within the rapidly growing water ice industry. Created by Water Ice Express LLC, this step-by-step guide provides the knowledge, strategies, and real-world insights needed to launch, operate, and scale a profitable water ice business with confidence.

From understanding the fundamentals of the industry to building a recognizable brand and creating long-term growth opportunities, Frozen Fortune walks entrepreneurs through every stage of the business journey. Whether you are starting with a simple setup, a mobile operation, or planning to expand into multiple locations and events, this guide was designed to help you build a strong foundation for lasting success.

Inside, readers will discover practical business strategies, operational guidance, marketing insights, equipment recommendations, and proven methods for turning a small investment into a scalable business opportunity. Each chapter was carefully developed to address both the challenges and opportunities unique to the water ice market, giving entrepreneurs the tools and confidence needed to move forward with purpose.

The water ice industry continues to create exciting opportunities for motivated individuals looking to build additional income, financial independence, and long-term business growth within their communities. The potential is real, the market is growing, and the opportunity is waiting.

The only question left is: Will you take the first step toward building your own Frozen Fortune?

title: The Holy Grail
tagline: The Complete Water Ice Business Collection — every strategy, system, and blueprint in one entrepreneurial resource.
description:
If you are serious about building, growing, and mastering a successful water ice business, The Holy Grail Package was created for you.

This all-in-one collection combines every major strategy, system, and blueprint from our complete eBook series into one powerful entrepreneurial resource designed to help you start, operate, market, scale, and expand your business with confidence.

Inside The Holy Grail, you will receive all five Water Ice Express eBooks: Frozen Fortune — launch your water ice business from the ground up with a complete step-by-step startup blueprint covering business foundations, operations, branding, equipment, and growth strategies. The Scoop Formula — discover the systems, structure, and operational methods needed to streamline your business, improve efficiency, and create a more professional customer experience. Coolers To CEO — gain access to business-building strategies, coaching insights, marketing systems, pricing methods, vendor opportunities, and entrepreneurial development designed to help you scale beyond daily sales. The Profit Playbook — master the financial side of the business by learning how to structure your company properly, track profits, manage inventory, maximize margins, and build long-term sustainability. Ice Cold Bookings — unlock advanced growth strategies through catering, prepaid event bookings, wholesale bucket sales, and distribution opportunities designed to help you create recurring revenue and expand your market reach.

Together, these guides create the ultimate blueprint for entrepreneurs looking to move from startup to scalable business owner within the water ice industry. Whether your goal is to operate locally, expand regionally, build a distribution network, or create a recognizable brand, The Holy Grail Package provides the education, systems, and strategies needed to help you get there.

This is more than a collection of eBooks. It is a complete entrepreneurial roadmap designed to help motivated individuals turn opportunity into income and transform a simple concept into a long-term business empire.
highlights: All five Water Ice Express eBooks in one package
chapters: Coolers To CEO — growth & coaching strategies
The Profit Playbook — financial mastery & margins
Ice Cold Bookings — catering, wholesale & distribution

title: Ice Cold Bookings
tagline: The Catering & Distribution Playbook — scale beyond daily cup sales into recurring, high-volume revenue.
description:
Welcome to Ice Cold Bookings — the ultimate guide for entrepreneurs ready to move beyond daily cup sales and start building a scalable, high-volume water ice business.

This playbook was created for motivated business owners who want to expand their opportunities through catering, prepaid event bookings, wholesale bucket sales, and distribution partnerships. While many vendors focus only on day-to-day transactions, the real growth comes from building recurring revenue streams, securing larger contracts, and positioning yourself as a trusted supplier within your market.

Inside Ice Cold Bookings, you will learn proven strategies for generating consistent bookings, structuring profitable catering packages, building strong customer relationships, and creating systems that allow your business to grow beyond a single location or setup. The guide also explores how to develop your own distribution network, manage larger orders efficiently, and position your business for long-term expansion.

Whether your goal is to serve private events, schools, corporate functions, festivals, vendors, or wholesale clients, this playbook provides practical guidance designed to help you scale smarter and operate more professionally.

This is more than just selling water ice. This is about building a brand, creating multiple income streams, and establishing a business that can continue growing year after year.

From vendor to distributor to empire builder, Ice Cold Bookings provides the blueprint to help you take your business to the next level with real strategies, real systems, and real opportunities for growth.

title: The Profit Playbook
tagline: Scoop It. Track It. Scale It. — releasing March 20, 2026. Pre-sale pricing available now.
description:
The wait is almost over. On March 20, 2026, Water Ice Express officially releases The Profit Playbook — a powerful step-by-step guide designed to help entrepreneurs turn hard work, hustle, and ambition into a profitable and scalable business.

This is more than just another eBook. The Profit Playbook was created to provide aspiring business owners with the systems, strategies, and operational knowledge needed to build a successful water ice business the right way from the very beginning.

Inside the guide, you will learn how to properly structure your business, manage daily operations, track revenue and expenses, maximize profits, organize inventory efficiently, and position your company for long-term growth. The book also covers important business fundamentals including permits, licensing, insurance requirements, and the key operational systems needed to run a professional and sustainable business.

Whether you are just getting started or looking to take your existing operation to the next level, The Profit Playbook delivers practical insights and real-world strategies designed to help entrepreneurs scale smarter and operate with confidence.

Pre-sale pricing is available now for $19.99, with the regular launch price increasing to $29.99 upon release. Early supporters will have the opportunity to lock in discounted access before the official launch and gain an early advantage in building their business foundation.

Success does not happen by accident. It happens through strategy, preparation, and execution.

The Profit Playbook is your blueprint to building a profitable future in the water ice industry.
chapters: Structuring your business the right way

title: The Scoop Formula
tagline: Mastering the art of making water ice — real recipes, formulas, and production methods.
description:
This could be the move that changes your summer income. The Scoop Formula Recipe eBook is a proven blueprint behind one of the most profitable summer businesses.

For $47.99, you get the real recipes, formulas, and production methods — no guessing.
